name: chartmogul
description: Reads and writes ChartMogul customers, contacts, subscription activities, plans, invoices, tasks, customer-count metrics, and account details through the ChartMogul REST API.

risk.read: external ChartMogul API read of customer, contact, CRM-task, plan, invoice, and subscription-metrics data
risk.write: external mutation of ChartMogul customer records; approval required
